docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT PERKINS, MARILYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERKINS, MARILYN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,725.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER TO CONTINUE AT DEFENDANT REQUEST
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCALAN VP OF TOWNING AND QA. DEFENDANT MARILYN PERKINS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$175.00) SERVED SEP-09-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PERKINS, MARILYN
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR FUTHER HEARING. MATTER CONTINUED TO JAN-26-2022 AT 3:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SAYEED SHAH, DIRECTOR OPERATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2021 - CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING BY THE COURT TO JAN-26-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, V.P. TOWING AND QUALITY ASSURANCE AND SAYEED SHAH, DIRECTOR OPERATIONS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARILYN PERKINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NEEDS TO FILE A CLAIM WITH CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RE: TOWING OF DEFENDANTS VEHICLE BY AUTORETURN. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506) (SEE NOTES)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-13-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCALAN, VP TOWING. DEFENDANT MARILYN PERKINS IS PRESENT. CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO APPEAL CITY CLAIM VERDICT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2022 - JUDGMENT.
